description: Three failed attempts to fix multi-schema source matching before writing an e2e test. Unit tests in each repo passed but did not test the real user workflow. The e2e Playwright test caught the mismatch immediately. Lesson: for multi-repo features, write the e2e test FIRST, confirm it fails, then fix.
resolution: Added Playwright e2e test infrastructure. The Petstore multi-schema test reproduces the exact production scenario. All future multi-repo features should start with an e2e test.
